name: eats-shoots-and-leaves
description: Lynne Truss's Eats, Shoots & Leaves — a hilarious and passionate guide to punctuation, apostrophes, commas, and the art of writing clearly.
useCase: Understanding apostrophes, mastering commas, using dashes and hyphens, quotation marks and colons, avoiding common mistakes, writing clearly.
knownRisks: Some punctuation conventions have evolved since the book was published in 2003
The book reflects British English conventions — American English differs in some details
Truss's strong opinions may not reflect universal punctuation standards
